texto: It used to take me forever to read and comprehend stuff, so I decided not to make the 'Captain Underpants' books too challenging. Don't get me wrong - the humor and ideas are often sophisticated - but the books aren't hard to read. I wanted kids who hate reading to find these books irresistible.
explicacao: Citação de Dav Pilkey sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “It used to take me forever to read and comprehend stuff, so I decided not to make the 'Captain Un…” articula humor, reading, hate em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como termino e hate.

texto: A book without potty humor is like a banana split without hot fudge. It can still be good, I suppose, but you kinda get the feeling that something is missing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dav Pilkey: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “A book without potty humor is like a banana split without hot fudge. It can still be good, I supp…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, good, book pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de book e you.
